title: Launch HN: Adam (YC W25) – Open-Source AI CAD
content: Hey HN! I'm Zach from Adam (https://adam.new/). We're building AI agents for mechanical CAD software. We've built the company on two fundamental beliefs: AI will be the primary medium for creating mechanical designs, and open-source is the way to get there. The project has generated significant interest on HN with developers debating whether AI can truly replace traditional CAD workflows or just augment them.
quote: AI 画图？先让它把我的 SolidWorks 许可证费省下来再说

title: Pentagon boasts of using AI to write reports mandated by Congress (1.5mil users)
content: The Pentagon claims 1.5 million users are now using their AI system to write reports mandated by Congress. This AI tool is being used to generate everything from routine memos to compliance documents that were previously drafted by human staff. The announcement has sparked heated debate on HN about government efficiency versus the potential risks of AI-generated official documents.
quote: 五角大楼的 AI 写报告，国会老爷们读得懂 AI 写的官样文章吗

title: AI demands more engineering discipline. Not less
content: A thoughtful essay arguing that the rise of AI coding assistants actually requires more, not less, engineering rigor. The author contends that AI-generated code still needs careful review, testing, and architectural oversight. While AI can boost raw output, it also amplifies bad practices if the engineering discipline isn't already strong. 210 points and 104 comments on HN reflect the community's deep engagement with this thesis.
quote: AI 写代码越方便，你越得守住代码质量的底线，不然屎山塌得更快

title: Sixty percent of US consumers say 'AI' in brand messaging is a turnoff
content: A WP VIP study reveals that 60% of US consumers are turned off by 'AI' mentions in brand messaging. With 841 points and 446 comments on HN, this topic clearly struck a nerve. The data suggests that while AI capabilities are advancing rapidly, consumers are increasingly skeptical of brands that loudly advertise their AI features. Brands may need to rethink how they communicate about AI integration.
quote: 消费者：别跟我说你有 AI，我只关心东西好不好用

title: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
content: An MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that gives AI coding assistants persistent memory of your codebase. It enables agents to remember project structure, conventions, and past decisions across sessions. This tool is part of the growing ecosystem around making AI assistants context-aware and capable of maintaining long-term understanding of complex projects.
quote: AI 终于有了鱼一样的记忆——7 秒后还记得你项目结构就不错了

title: 大家对于 Anthropic 估值的看法
content: 近三个月，Anthropic 估值从 3800 亿涨到了最近的 9000 亿。V2EX 用户们热议这家公司上市后的前景——单单挣程序员的钱能支撑这么高的估值吗。网友们各执一词：有人看好 Claude 在企业市场的潜力，有人觉得这个估值完全是 AI 泡沫的延续，还有人指出 Anthropic 的营收增速确实惊人但基数依然很小。
quote: 3000 亿到 9000 亿，Anthropic 用三个月走完了别人三十年的路，但程序员的数量可没涨三倍

title: 🖖Manus 被 Meta 数十亿美元收购❗❗❗
content: 这几天最爆的新闻围绕着 Manus——国内争议最大的 AI 公司之一，迎来了可以说最好的结局：被 Meta 数十亿美元收购！V2EX 上对此事的讨论热度极高，86 条回复中既有对创始人变现成功的祝贺，也有对 Manus 技术实力与营销手段之争的持续争论。无可争议的是，这笔交易为中国 AI 创业公司开辟了一条新的退出路径。
quote: Manus 卖身 Meta，之前的争议瞬间变成了成功的注脚——钱到位了啥都好说

title: Why We Open-Sourced Our Cloud IDE (AGPL)
content: The author shares the story of open-sourcing their cloud IDE under AGPL. The frustration that drove this decision: AI coding tools often lack visibility into what they're actually doing. By open-sourcing the IDE, they enable developers to inspect, modify, and trust the environment their AI assistants operate in. A candid reflection on the trade-offs between building a proprietary product and contributing to the open-source ecosystem.
quote: 云 IDE 开源了，Agpl 协议让大厂抄也不是不抄也不是

title: What 506K real transactions taught me about how Latin Americans actually save
content: For nine years the author ran Coinch, a goal-based savings app used by 30,000+ people across Mexico, Colombia, Argentina, Peru and Chile. When it wound down in 2024, it left behind 506,311 records of real saving behavior. The analysis reveals surprising patterns about how people in emerging economies approach financial planning, challenging many assumptions held by fintech companies building for these markets.
quote: 50 万条真实交易记录告诉你，拉美人怎么存钱——结论是：他们比你想象中会过日子

title: A Complete Guide to Enterprise Application Testing: Types, Process & Best Practices
content: Enterprise application testing is the structured process of validating complex, interconnected business software such as ERP, CRM, SCM, and HCM systems to ensure they perform reliably, integrate seamlessly, and meet security compliance standards. This comprehensive guide covers testing types, process flows, and best practices for organizations managing large-scale enterprise application portfolios.
quote: 企业级测试指南——说白了就是让你在甲方验收前把 bug 藏好

title: 浏览器缓存之【基础键值存储】：Local storage 和 Session storage - 橙子家
content: 虽然在日常口语中我们常把浏览器中 Application 到 Storage 模块中的多种类型统称为'浏览器缓存'，但在专业定义中，实际上包含了'存储'与'缓存'两个截然不同但又紧密相关的概念体系。本文着重介绍了 Local storage 和 Session storage 的基本概念、API 使用、存储限制以及在实际开发中的最佳实践，帮助前端开发者区分并正确使用这两者。
quote: 都 2026 年了还在纠结 LocalStorage 和 SessionStorage 的区别，前端入门教程永不缺席

title: UI Output Protocol 架构拆解：Markdown、HTML 和 UI DSL 的分工协作 - AI小老六
content: 拆解 AI 产品输出从文本到工作台的协议分层：Markdown 写文档，HTML 承载页面，UI DSL 接住操作。文章深入分析了为什么 AI 产品的输出越来越像'页面'——有卡片、有筛选器、有图表、有可点击操作。Markdown 适合文档类输出，HTML 适合页面级展现，而 UI DSL 则是对交互操作的标准化封装，三者的分工与协同构成了 AI 输出的完整协议栈。
quote: AI 输出越来越花哨，从 Markdown 到 UI DSL，就差 AI 自己把前端代码也写了

title: Excelize 开源社区荣获 2025 红山开源明星项目三等奖
content: 2025 年 11 月 16 日，由红山开源平台主办的'2025 红山开源大会'在北京香山颐和宾馆红山厅成功落下帷幕。Excelize 开源社区荣获了 2025 红山开源明星项目三等奖。Excelize 是用于操作电子表格办公文档的开源库，在 Go 语言生态中被广泛使用，此次获奖是对其在中国开源社区影响力的认可。
quote: Excel 操作库拿开源奖，说明大家加班做报表的需求始终旺盛

title: Google Antigravity 出来啦
content: Google Antigravity，免费可以使用 Gemini 3 Pro 和 Claude Sonnet 4.5！V2EX 用户们纷纷尝试这个新平台，对 Google 免费提供如此高端的模型感到惊讶。有人质疑这种免费策略能持续多久，也有人已经在使用中进行各种有趣的测试。这个项目在开发者社区中引起了广泛关注，大家对'白嫖'顶级模型的机会自然趋之若鹜。
quote: Google 免费送你 Gemini 3 Pro，是不是该感恩戴德？先看看数据会去哪再说
